description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel mounted horizontally on a wooden stand, designed to keep the barrel elevated and stable. The barrel features two prominent black metal hoops encircling its body, providing structural reinforcement and a classic appearance. The wood is textured with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and handcrafted look. On one end of the barrel, there is a spigot for dispensing liquid, and a triangular marking is visible, possibly indicating branding or contents. The stand is constructed from matching wood, with simple joinery and sturdy legs, and has a cutout to cradle the barrel securely. This object is typically used for storing and dispensing beverages such as wine, beer, or water in urban or communal settings.
description: A wooden barrel with black metal hoops sits on a matching wooden stand, featuring a spigot and a triangular marking on one end. The rustic design and sturdy construction suggest it is used for dispensing liquids in communal or urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the barrel's wood grain, black metal hoops, and the full wooden stand beneath.
description_view_1: End view of the barrel, showing the circular wooden face and the open cradle of the stand.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the spigot side not visible.
description_view_3: End view with the spigot and a triangular marking visible on the barrel's face, showing the dispensing side.
